title: P1: Fix dual TaskSequenceGoal advancement paths — extract ResetForNextSequenceStep
description: Two code paths advance TaskSequenceGoal: TryCompleteCurrentGoalFromWorldUpdate (event path) and TryAdvanceSequence (dispatch loop path). The event path only clears the queue without resetting _consecutiveFailures, _lastFailureReason, replanGovernor, etc. This can cause the next step to start with stale failure counters or a stalled governor. Fix: extract shared ResetForNextSequenceStep(TaskSequenceGoal) method and call from both paths. Sprint 57 Wave D fixed this.
